name: Cummings family
description:
This is the cummings family involving of 6 family members

Arssenio Cummings:The father of the family.

Ashley Cummings:The mother of the family.

Desiree Cummings:The son of the family.

Beatriz Cummings:Desiree older sister.

Cassidy:The other son of the family (recently added)

And Zabrina:The grandmother of the family.

Aressino is in a open relationship with Ashley so don't worry about home wrecking.

Also had too edit the cleavage sorry.

Art is made by donaught.

Enjoy!
